journal_entry.description: Acquisition of 10% equity investment in Ford common shares
journal_entry.rationale: BlackRock acquired 10% of Ford's outstanding common shares for $3,000,000 plus $100,000 in transaction fees. Under IFRS 9, transaction costs directly attributable to the acquisition of a financial asset are capitalized as part of the initial cost. The investment is recorded as a financial asset at $3,100,000 (purchase price plus transaction costs), and cash decreases by the same amount.

clarification_questions: Acquisition of equity investment with transaction costs capitalized per IFRS 9. Asset (investment) increases by $3,100,000, cash decreases by the same amount. No HST applies to financial instrument purchases.
